response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum requirement of 15 years of engineering experience and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial drive through his startup and open-source work. However, his profile leans heavily toward hands-on full-stack and GIS development rather than the Director-level enterprise AI strategy and advisory focus required for this role. He lacks the deep, recognized AI/ML expertise and the advanced AI degree preferred for a Principal-level AI strategy position.
strengths: Exceeds the minimum requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience across various domains.
Entrepreneurial experience founding and managing an open-source platform (GISCollective).
Active technical community contributor through workshops, talks, and open-source libraries.
concerns: Limited demonstrated experience in enterprise AI strategy and machine learning product development.
Current and past roles are primarily hands-on engineering rather than Director-level strategic advisory.
Lacks the preferred advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field.
